description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock, reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms such as the Karabiner 98k. The stock is made of polished wood with visible grain and a slightly reddish-brown hue, featuring a curved butt and a metal buttplate. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with a long, slender barrel extending from the wooden fore-end. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a rear notch and a front post, and a cylindrical muzzle device is attached to the end of the barrel. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, and the trigger guard and magazine floorplate are also made of metal. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and suitable for both military and civilian use in urban environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long metal barrel, iron sights, and a cylindrical muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, and attached muzzle device.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, bolt handle, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal components, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the trigger guard, magazine floorplate, and the underside of the stock.
